scripts.generate:types: mkdir -p src/lib/api/openapi && openapi-typescript ../core/api/orchestrator/openapi.yaml -o src/lib/api/openapi/orchestrator.ts --root-types && openapi-typescript ../core/api/assessment/openapi.yaml -o src/lib/api/openapi/assessment.ts --root-types && openapi-typescript ../core/api/evidence/openapi.yaml -o src/lib/api/openapi/evidence.ts --root-types && openapi-typescript ../core/api/evaluation/openapi.yaml -o src/lib/api/openapi/evaluation.ts --root-types
